captures.response_content_type: text/event-stream (SSE — Server-Sent Events; ChatGPT streams turn deltas)
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not directly readable (Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard). POST /backend-api/f/conversation returned 200; answer streamed into div.markdown. Known ChatGPT SSE framing: 'data: {json delta}\n\n' frames terminated by 'data: [DONE]'. Stream tracked via GET /backend-api/conversation/<id>/stream_status. Raw bytes need CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: SSE: 'data: ' prefix per frame, '\n\n' delimiter, terminal 'data: [DONE]' (standard ChatGPT) — not byte-confirmed via taint-guard
captures.dom_render_structure: Assistant turn: section.text-token-text-primary > div.text-base > div > div.flex > div.min-h-8 ... [data-message-author-role=assistant][data-message-model-slug=gpt-5-5]. Answer markdown in div.markdown.prose.dark:prose-invert. Each turn wrapped in article/div [data-testid=conversation-turn-N]. Action toolbar (copy/like/dislike/share/regenerate) below.
captures.framework: React (custom build; NOT __NEXT_DATA__/#__next — uses Remix/app-style routing, data-testid + data-message-* attributes). Tailwind (prose).

notes: Logged in (최장희, Free). Benign prompt SUCCEEDED: GPT-5 (model-slug gpt-5-5) answered with a one-sentence Korean greeting. Chat POST endpoint confirmed = /backend-api/f/conversation (as flagged in request), preceded by /f/conversation/prepare, then SSE stream + /conversation/<id>/stream_status poll. Supporting: /backend-api/conversations (list), /conversation/<id>/textdocs, /gizmos/snorlax/sidebar. etap-bypassed clean baseline. Exact SSE frame bytes need CDP/HAR (taint-guard).
